chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 726 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objections No.2,3,4,5 & 8 2. For order on Misc. No.3884/2025 3. For order on Misc. No.3885/2025 4. For hearing of main case 24.02.2025 Malik Altaf Hussain, advocate for the petitioner Serious office objections have been raised as to the maintainability as denoted from the memorandum. In addition thereto it is stated that parallel recourse under SPPRA Rules has already been initiated, therefore, under such circumstances no case is made out for concurrent recourse to writ jurisdiction. Petition found to be misconceived, hence, the same is dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
